full_text:
Received a “big” piece of omentum tissue. Removed bloody black areas, as well as fatty pieces.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 3x 7.468 E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 3x 7.20 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

C) Flow staining

The conditions to stain were:

sequentially dissociated cells, all FMOs

dispase dissociated cells, MC

sequentially dissociated cells, MC

The aliquots were stained with the following panel and according to this protocol Fibroblast_flow_cytometry_staining_protocol.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 7.89 | 9.04
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 6.54 | 7.74
 | viability [%] | 82.9 | 85.6
 | size [µm] | 8.7 | 10.9
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 8.38 | 12.7
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 6.38 | 9.06
 | viability [%] | 76.2 | 71.6
 | size [µm] | 9.1 | 8.2
Average | [cells/ml] | 8.135 E6 | 10.87 E6
 | total [cells] | 24.405 E6 in 3 ml | 32.61 E6 in 3 ml
 | viability [%] | 79,55 | 78,6
